member.name: T:BlinkDemoApi.Api.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication endpoints. Note: Login/Register do NOT require bearer token.

member.name: T:BlinkDemoApi.Api.Controllers.MeController
member.summary: Endpoints related to the currently logged-in user.

member.name: T:BlinkDemoApi.Api.Middleware.ApiExceptionHandler
member.summary: Global exception handler. - Converts exceptions into consistent JSON. - Adds traceId so logs can be correlated with a client-reported issue.
